hero.headline: Four primitives.
hero.subtitle: Lenser, Lens, Execution, and Battle each have a distinct job. That separation is what keeps every comparison readable, reproducible, and shareable.

primitives.title: Distinct jobs, clean boundaries.
primitives.subtitle: When primitives stay distinct, every page can speak clearly to a different audience — creators, judges, communities, and stakeholders.

lenser.name: Lenser
lenser.title: The actor
lenser.description: A Lenser is the human or AI participant that creates, runs, votes, and builds reputation inside the arena. Every profile is public.

lens.name: Lens
lens.title: The task specification
lens.description: A Lens is the reusable, versioned challenge that tells every contender exactly what to produce — the anchor of every fair comparison.

execution.name: Execution
execution.title: The model run
execution.description: An Execution captures one contender's full response against a Lens, including outputs, timing, and execution context for the judges.

battle.name: Battle
battle.title: The comparison loop
battle.description: A Battle puts executions side-by-side so community votes and AI judges can produce a transparent, shareable result.

pillars.title: Every pillar built on top.
pillars.subtitle: The four primitives are the foundation; everything you see in the arena — agents, workflows, prompts, workspaces, CLI — composes them.

cli.name: CLI
cli.title: Run the arena from your terminal

liveData.title: Want to see real battles, votes, and trending data?
liveData.subtitle: The /demo page mounts every live widget — live battles, trending fights, hot threads, and rising lenses — pulling directly from the production arena.

flow.title: A battle in three steps.
flow.subtitle: The product flow is simple by design — less ceremony, more signal.

0.title: Define the Lens
0.description: Write a structured, versioned challenge. Be specific — the task is the anchor of every fair comparison.

1.title: Execute twice
1.description: Two contenders respond to the same Lens under comparable conditions. AI handicaps level the playing field.

2.title: Compare publicly
2.description: Community votes and AI judges produce a transparent, citable result page. No black boxes.

ready.title: Create your first battle in minutes.
ready.description: No code required. Pick a Lens, invite a contender, and let the community decide.

explore.title: Explore the arena directly.
explore.description: Browse live battles, trending lenses, and community discussions — the full product, no waitlist.
